title: Machine Learning Intern
description: Work on machine learning prototypes using Python, PyTorch, deep learning, pandas, NumPy, and SQL.
requirements: Requirements: Python, Machine Learning, PyTorch, SQL, Pandas, and NumPy experience required.
responsibilities: Build models, evaluate results, and communicate findings clearly.

title: Data Science Intern
description: Analyze product data using Python, SQL, pandas, NumPy, statistics, dashboards, and machine learning.
requirements: Requirements: Python, SQL, Pandas, NumPy, Machine Learning, and clear reporting.
responsibilities: Create notebooks, summarize trends, and support experiment analysis.

title: Backend Intern
description: Build backend APIs and services using Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, Git, and SQL.
requirements: Requirements: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, SQL, and Git experience required.
responsibilities: Implement API endpoints, write tests, and collaborate on service design.

title: Frontend Intern
